Vulnerabilities.Title: Apache Log4j2 remote code execution (Log4Shell)
Vulnerabilities.Description: JNDI lookup features in Log4j allow remote code execution via crafted log messages.

Vulnerabilities.Title: curl: heap buffer overflow in SOCKS5 proxy handshake
Vulnerabilities.Description: A heap-based buffer overflow in the SOCKS5 proxy handshake may allow remote code execution.

Vulnerabilities.Title: zlib: integer overflow / heap overflow via MiniZip
Vulnerabilities.Description: An integer overflow and subsequent heap overflow in MiniZip in zlib.

Vulnerabilities.Title: glibc: iconv buffer overflow (CUPS / PHP RCE path)
Vulnerabilities.Description: A buffer overflow in the glibc iconv implementation can lead to arbitrary code execution.

Vulnerabilities.Title: busybox: weak default credentials in some images
Vulnerabilities.Description: Some container images ship busybox with weak or empty default credentials.
